testcase.name: blankMobileTest

failure.message: Expected blank mobile number toast. expected [Something went wrong.] but found [Please enter Mobile no.]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Expected blank mobile number toast. expected [Something went wrong.] but found [Please enter Mobile no.] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at testcase.name: invalidCredentialsTest

failure.message: Expected invalid credentials toast. expected [Username or Password is incorrect.] but found [Please enter Mobile no.]
